(a) On filing of the bond and oath required by Section 66.039 (Oath; Bond) , the board shall certify to the governor that a person licensed as a branch pilot has qualified.

markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 4
### Chapter 66. Houston Pilots Licensing & Regul. Act
##### § 66.037 — Branch Pilot Appointment by Governor

(a) On filing of the bond and oath required by Section 66.039 (Oath; Bond) , the board shall certify to the governor that a person licensed as a branch pilot has qualified.

(b) On receipt of the board’s certification, the governor shall issue to the person, in the name of the state and under the state seal, a commission to serve as a branch pilot to and from Harris County ports.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: On filing of the bond and oath required by Section 66.039 (Oath; Bond) , the board shall certify to the governor that a person licensed as a branch pilot has qualified.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: On receipt of the board’s certification, the governor shall issue to the person, in the name of the state and under the state seal, a commission to serve as a branch pilot to and from Harris County ports.

history.raw: Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.
